topStories.title: Oil rises for a fourth day on supply cuts from widening Middle East conflict
topStories.description: Oil prices are climbing for the fourth day. Brent crude is set for its largest monthly gain ever. U.S. crude futures are also seeing a significant increase. dailyNews.title: TSA Workers Begin to Receive Paychecks After Trump Signs Executive Order
dailyNews.description: A memo that President Trump signed on Friday ordering the Department of Homeland Security to pay T.S.A. officers did not specify whether they would be paid on a regular schedule.

dailyNews.title: Senators Seek Answers From Trump Administration About Airport Immigration Arrests
dailyNews.description: Airport security officials have been sharing passenger data with immigration agents, but the program received little attention until videos captured a woman and her daughter being detained at San Francisco’s airport.

dailyNews.title: Mexico Pressures U.S. Over Deaths of Its Citizens in ICE Custody
dailyNews.description: Claudia Sheinbaum, president of Mexico, said her country would take legal steps to demand better conditions at immigration detention facilities, where she said 14 Mexican citizens had died since President Trump took office.

dailyNews.title: After Months of Threats, Trump Softens His Stance on Blocking Oil to Cuba
dailyNews.description: The White House press secretary said the United States would evaluate oil shipments to Cuba on a “case-by-case basis,” after a Russian tanker full of crude reached the island.

dailyNews.title: DeSantis Signs Bill to Rename Florida Airport for Trump
dailyNews.description: The airport near West Palm Beach will be rebranded the President Donald J. Trump International Airport on July 1, if approved by the Federal Aviation Administration.

dailyNews.title: Trump Reveals New Look for White House Ballroom After Times Article
dailyNews.description: Architects and preservation organizations have warned that little scrutiny has been given to the project’s design plans.

dailyNews.title: ‘I Think That MAGA Is Dying:’ Inside the Youth Movement at CPAC
dailyNews.description: At a sparsely attended Conservative Political Action Conference, young Republicans were eager to start the post-Trump era.

dailyNews.title: States Plow Ahead With A.I. Regulation, Defying Trump
dailyNews.description: States ranging from California to Utah are taking steps to place guardrails on the technology even after the president ordered them to stop.

dailyNews.title: White House questioned about Trump's threat to target Iranian civilian infrastructure
dailyNews.description: During a press briefing, NBC News' Garrett Haake questioned White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt about President Trump's recent social media post threatening to target Iranian infrastructure, including electric generating and water desalinization plants.

dailyNews.title: Are there talks to end the Iran war? Depends on which side you ask
dailyNews.description: It has been more than a week since President Donald Trump announced the U.S. was in conversation with Iran. But Tehran denies negotiations are taking place .

dailyNews.title: WH pressed on Trump’s threat to hit civilian infrastructure in Iran
dailyNews.description: In a post on Truth Social, President Donald Trump threatened the destruction of Iran's civilian energy and water infrastructure if a deal to end the war and reopen the crucial Strait of Hormuz is not reached soon. NBC News' Garrett Haake questioned White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt about the president's threat.

dailyNews.title: White House holds press briefing
dailyNews.description: Watch live coverage as White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt holds a press briefing.
